code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const categories=[{name:"Salary",icon:"💰"},{name:"Freelance",icon:"🖋️"},{name:"Investment",icon:"📈"},{name:"Gift",icon:"🎁"},{name:"Bonus",icon:"🏆"},{name:"Interest",icon:"🏦"},{name:"Rental",icon:"🏠"},{name:"Dividend",icon:"💵"},{name:"Side Hustle",icon:"🛠️"},{name:"Refund",icon:"🔄"},{name:"Cashback",icon:"💳"},{name:"Commission",icon:"📬"},{name:"Allowance",icon:"🧾"},{name:"Lottery",icon:"🎰"},{name:"Other",icon:"✨"}];const IncomeForm=_ref=>{let{onAddIncome}=_ref;const[category,setCategory]=useState("");const[amount,setAmount]=useState("");const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();const num=Number(amount);if(!category||!amount||num<=0)return;onAddIncome({category,amount:num});setCategory("");setAmount("");};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,className:"form income-form",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Add Income"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"category-grid",children:categories.map(cat=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`category-item ${category===cat.name?"selected":""}`,onClick:()=>setCategory(cat.name),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"icon",children:cat.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:cat.name})]},cat.name))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",placeholder:"Amount",value:amount,onChange:e=>setAmount(e.target.value),min:"0",step:"0.01"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Add Income"})]});};export default IncomeForm;
